title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings then Security and choose Reset Password.

title: Account Creation
content: Users can create a new account by clicking Sign Up and filling the registration form.

title: Subscription Plans
content: Premium subscription plans can be upgraded from the billing section of the user dashboard.

title: Profile Update
content: Users can update their profile information from the account settings page.

title: Support Contact
content: Users can contact support through the Help Center or support email.
